features: Package Contents - - Include 1 Pack Compatible Toner Cartridges for Xerox B400 B405 with Chip, 106R03584 Black x 1.
Compatible Printers - - Suitable for use in Xerox VersaLink B400, B400n, B400dn, B405, B405dn, B400V / N, B400V / DN, B405V / N, B405V / DN Printers.
High Print Yields - - Up to 24,600 pages per toner cartridge, 5% coverage at A4 pager, based on ISO / IEC 19752.
Print Advantages - - Refined toner powder and high-quality cartridge, deliver accurate bright color, sharp black and crisp graphics.
Reliable Warranty - - Timely after-sales and quality assurance services, let you to enjoy the fun of printing easily.
